sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Hello World'), ('Clickhouse is great'), ('Fuzzy testing is fun');
UPDATE test_strings SET haystack = 'Hello Universe' WHERE multiSearchFirstIndex(haystack, ['World']) > 0;
SELECT multiSearchFirstIndex(haystack, ['Clickhouse', 'Hello']) FROM test_strings WHERE haystack LIKE 'Fuzzy%';
